ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "data_id" TEXT /* Data ID for the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level of the individual */,
  "black" INTEGER /* Indicator for black ethnicity */,
  "hispanic" INTEGER /* Indicator for Hispanic ethnicity */,
  "married" INTEGER /* Indicator for marital status */,
  "nodegree" INTEGER /* Indicator for no degree */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_married FOREIGN KEY ("married") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_hispanic FOREIGN KEY ("hispanic") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_age FOREIGN KEY ("age") REFERENCES individuals ("age"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_nodegree FOREIGN KEY ("nodegree") REFERENCES degrees ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_black FOREIGN KEY ("black") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_id_map ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_id_map" (
  "data_id" TEXT /* Data ID */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Dataset ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_treatments" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Individual ID */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Treatment ID */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of treatment assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment assignment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment assignment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings" (
  "earnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Individual ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of earnings */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings amount */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the earnings */,
  "currency_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for the currency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the earnings record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the earnings record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Individual ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of employment */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the employer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "full_time" INTEGER /* Indicator for full-time employment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_education" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Individual ID */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Education level ID */,
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Degree ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "education_level_id", "degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_ethnicity" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Individual ID */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Ethnicity ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_marital_status" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Individual ID */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Marital status ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_degrees" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Individual ID */,
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Degree ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
